query:
SELECT 
  DATE(created_at) as date,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM biddings
WHERE DATE(created_at) = '2026-01-23'
GROUP BY DATE(created_at);

SELECT 
  DATE(publication_date) as pub_date,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM biddings
WHERE DATE(publication_date) = '2026-01-23'
GROUP BY DATE(publication_date);
